title: pterocaulon decurrens
intro: Pterocaulon decurrens, also known as the running club moss, is a type of lycopodiophyte plant that belongs to the Pterocaulon genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pterocaulon decurrens include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pterocaulon decurrens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
